title: Invoice export silently drops rows when a custom date range crosses month boundaries
summary: Finance users report missing rows in CSV exports for month-end reporting. Reproduces intermittently in the billing dashboard.

summary: Internal operations team wants faster approval workflows in the admin console.

title: Webhook retry job spikes CPU after partner credential rotation
summary: Batch retry worker enters a hot loop if remote 401s begin mid-run. SRE attached logs and a likely code path.

summary: Legacy feature flag still gates an onboarding branch that should be dead. Cleanup is safe if docs are updated with the current flow.

title: Search filters in case review page reset when navigating back from detail view
summary: Analysts lose their place repeatedly while reviewing fraud cases. Issue appears isolated to one route transition.
